evals.prompt: Preciso converter o arquivo apresentacao_q4.pptx que esta na minha pasta ~/Downloads para PDF para enviar por email pro meu chefe hoje
evals.expected_output: Uses cloudconvert_convert with input_file pointing to the pptx, output_format pdf; reports saved_path after download

assertions.text: Calls cloudconvert_convert (not create_job directly)
Uses input_file parameter with the pptx path
Sets output_format to 'pdf'
Reports the saved_path to the user after conversion
Does not prompt for API key (assumes it is set)

evals.prompt: Tenho um video .mov gravado no celular que esta em /tmp/gravacao.mov, precisa virar mp4 menor pra postar no site da empresa. Qualidade media ta bom
evals.expected_output: Uses cloudconvert_convert with input_file=/tmp/gravacao.mov, output_format=mp4, options with video codec or quality settings

assertions.text: Calls cloudconvert_convert with output_format='mp4'
Passes compression/quality options (e.g. video_codec or crf)
Mentions free tier credit consumption warning for video
Reports saved_path after download

evals.prompt: Preciso juntar 3 PDFs num unico arquivo: /docs/relatorio_jan.pdf, /docs/relatorio_fev.pdf e /docs/relatorio_mar.pdf. O resultado deve ficar em /docs/relatorio_q1.pdf
evals.expected_output: Uses cloudconvert_pdf_operations with operation=merge, input_files=[...3 paths...], output_path=/docs/relatorio_q1.pdf

assertions.text: Calls cloudconvert_pdf_operations with operation='merge'
Passes all 3 file paths in input_files
Sets output_path to /docs/relatorio_q1.pdf
Reports the final merged file path

evals.prompt: Esse PDF /scans/contrato_assinado.pdf foi escaneado e ta em formato de imagem, preciso extrair o texto pra poder editar. O documento e em portugues
evals.expected_output: Uses cloudconvert_pdf_operations with operation=ocr, input_files=[...], options={language: 'por'}

assertions.text: Calls cloudconvert_pdf_operations with operation='ocr'
Passes language='por' or language='pt' in options
Uses input_files with the correct path
Reports where the OCR'd PDF was saved

evals.prompt: Quero converter logo.png para SVG para usar em escala no site. E possivel?
evals.expected_output: Calls cloudconvert_list_formats first to check raster-to-vector support; explains limitation if unsupported; suggests alternatives (e.g. png→svg via tracing, or use webp/avif instead)

assertions.text: Calls cloudconvert_list_formats before attempting conversion
Explains raster-to-vector limitation clearly if not supported
Suggests realistic alternatives (svg tracing, vector tools, or other formats)
